title: Hair not growing after plasma treatment is not medical negligence: NCDRC
description: The National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (NCDRC) recently held that doctors cannot be held liable for medical negligence merely because a patient did not experience hair regrowth after Platelet Rich Plasma (PRP) treatment [Dr Satish Kishornandan Arolkar Vs Sushil Mukesh Gaglani].A Bench of Presiding Member AVM J Rajendra and Member Justice Anoop Kumar Mendiratta passed the ruling."It is also well established that all patients do not uniformly benefit from the hair growth factor treatm
